overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a grand Gothic dining hall reminiscent of a magical castle, illuminated by floating candle chandeliers. The scene shows long dining tables filled with figures beneath towering stained glass windows, with a stationary camera capturing the warm, atmospheric interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic great hall with floating candle chandeliers and long dining tables

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the grand hall from an elevated position at the rear, overlooking the dining area

notable_agents.action: ghostly translucent blue figure seated at the dining table, appearing ethereal and semi-transparent
robed figure walking slowly down the central aisle between the dining tables toward the front

entered.detail: Multiple clusters of floating candles suspended in mid-air providing warm illumination throughout the hall
Large ornate Gothic stained glass window at the far end of the hall with intricate designs
Long wooden dining tables arranged in parallel rows extending the length of the hall
Tall stone walls with Gothic architectural details and vertical windows
Tall stone walls with Gothic architectural details and vertical windows
Wall-mounted torch brackets with warm flames between the windows
Wall-mounted torch brackets with warm flames between the windows

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady elevated view of a magnificent Gothic dining hall bathed in the warm glow of floating candle chandeliers. Long tables fill the space with seated diners, while a ghostly translucent figure sits at the nearest table on the right. The hall extends toward a large stained glass window at the far end, with stone walls and torch sconces lining the sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, elevated perspective of a magnificent Gothic dining hall that remains bathed in a warm, atmospheric glow. It begins by capturing the vast scale of the room, where floating candle chandeliers cast light over long tables filled with seated diners. As the gaze lingers, the camera reveals a ghostly translucent figure sitting at the nearest table on the right, adding a supernatural element to the scene. The view then extends across the stone walls and torch sconces, finally drawing the eye toward a towering stained glass window that anchors the far end of the hall.
